Pleasant Hill Preserve, 256-280 Pleasant Hill Rd, Scarborough, ME 04074, USA

two medium sized apple trees. one has big yellow fruit that is very sweet around october. i was too late in the season to try the other one. shaking the tree made a lot fall down. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
